stemHtml: All passenger seats on the aircraft are occupied, and an additional passenger requests to board. What options are available?

options.a: The additional passenger is not permitted in the cockpit under any circumstances, although the captain may allow another crew member on the jump seat.
options.b: The passenger may be allowed to occupy the cockpit jump seat, subject to the Operations Manual provisions, with the captain making the final decision.
options.c: The captain may decide whether the extra passenger can be accommodated, considering all available seating throughout the aircraft.
options.d: The passenger must find alternative arrangements as no passengers are ever allowed in the cockpit.
